persona_description.description: A one-sentence summary of the user's identity and primary goal.

task_complexity_gradient.description: The range of task complexity the user is comfortable with between 0 and 1.

real_world_context_embedding.description: A label of the user's real-world context.

persona_based_task_framing.description: A label of the user's persona and how they would frame a task.

preference_and_underspecification_handli.description: How the user prefers the model to handle ambiguity and underspecified requirements.

default_behavior.description: What the model should do by default when requirements are unclear.

desired_clarification_style.description: How the model should phrase clarifying questions when needed.

clarity_and_comprehensibility.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is clear and understandable output for this user.

workflow_fit.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is fitting the user's workflow in terms of time, steps, and iteration cost.

friction_and_frustration.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is minimizing friction and frustration for this user.

reliability.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is perceived reliability and trustworthiness for this user.

persona_consistency_and_context_awarenes.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is persona consistency and context awareness for this user.

safety_and_refusal_behavior.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is appropriate safety and refusal behavior for this user.

anthropomorphism.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important is human-like interaction for this user (1 = prefers robotic, 5 = prefers human-like).

creativity_and_originality.description: On a scale of 1 to 5, how important are creative and original solutions for this user.

expressive_style.description: A description of the user's preferred expressive style for model output.
